_comment: Sample shape for adding session-controls to Claude Code by hand. Merge `mcpServers` into ~/.claude.json (user scope) or ./.claude/settings.json (project scope). The `permissions.allow` entries belong in ~/.claude/settings.json (or the project-scope file in the project case). For the typical `uv tool install` / `pipx install` install, the bare command name shown here works because the console script lands on PATH. If you have a local checkout instead, replace "command" with the absolute path to <repo>/.venv/bin/session-controls. The `session-controls install` command writes both pieces automatically; this example is for adopters who prefer to edit by hand.
